title: Luffy Meets Chopper
description: On pages 6–8, luffy meets chopper as nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him.
scene: Luffy Meets Chopper. Nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You still have a fever, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No I don't, it's pretty much all gone now.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The AN- Swer's still a no.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: The doctors' medicine is highly effective so it's natural for your fever to be almost gone.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But even so, your body hasn't completely fought off the bacterial infection yet.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: That's why you still need to stay put and receive another dose of antibiotics. Otherwise-

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You were the one who nursed me back to health, right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't need to hear any words of thanks from a human!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: can't hide his emotions at all, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Not only is it freezing in here, but there's snow everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahh! You're right, it is cold!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This entire castle's covered with snow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The doors of all the unused rooms are frozen over too!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Luffy, give up on trying to recruit her! She's clearly no doctor! She's just a deranged lunatic!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: D-Does that mean you carry a flag with skull and crossbones...!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's right on our ship's sail.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Rillinghit, of course you're not. My bad.

summary: This part centers on luffy meets chopper, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
